function.name: _company_app_create
function.description: Create a team application. Must provide application name, optionally set color, icon, group, and create based on template.

name.description: Application name. Cannot contain special characters like , . / \

icon.description:
Application icon. Can only be filled with one of the following values:
home、flask、home-2、links、git-branch、task、global、file-add

groupId.description: Group ID, if empty, create under the default group

appDefineId.description: Format: 2~100 characters of English, numbers, underscores_ and.
